questions: Identify the creative design publication that released a curated list specifically titled (or concerning) 'The 17 best photography websites'. Search within this same publication's archives to find a buying guide for mobile devices that explicitly includes the phrase 'tried and tested by a photographer' in its headline. Provide the full title of this mobile device review article.

rounds.rationale: The question requires Deep Reasoning to identify the correct publisher ('Creative Bloq') based on the specific count and topic of the ancestor article ('The 17 best photography websites'). It then requires Wide Aggregation to search that specific domain for a secondary article defined by a unique string ('tried and tested by a photographer') to retrieve the correct headline.

rounds.answer_a:
Creative Bloq is the design-focused magazine responsible for the feature “The 17 best photography websites.” Digging further into its hardware guides reveals a mobile-device review whose headline carries the required wording: “Best iPad for photo editing 2023 — tried and tested by a photographer.” This article compares current Apple tablets, assessing screens, speed and pen support from a shooter’s perspective. [1][2]

## References
[1] Creative Bloq. “The 17 best photography websites.” https://www.creativebloq.com/inspiration/the-17-best-photography-websites  
[2] Creative Bloq. “Best iPad for photo editing 2023 — tried and tested by a photographer.” https://www.creativebloq.com/buying-guides/best-ipad-for-photo-editing
rounds.answer_b:
Creative Bloq published "The 17 best photography websites" as a curated list showcasing top photography platforms and portfolios[1]. Within Creative Bloq's archives, the mobile device buying guide that explicitly includes "tried and tested by a photographer" in its headline is titled "The best camera phones in 2024: tried and tested by a photographer"[2]. This comprehensive review article evaluates various smartphones specifically from a photographer's perspective, providing hands-on insights about camera capabilities, image quality, and practical photography features across different mobile devices.

## References
[1] Creative Bloq - The 17 best photography websites
[2] Creative Bloq - The best camera phones in 2024: tried and tested by a photographer
rounds.judge_reasoning: Both agents correctly identified the publisher (Creative Bloq). However, Agent B correctly identified the specific article requested ('The best camera phones'), which aligns with the Ground Truth checklist. Agent A identified an iPad article; while an iPad is technically a mobile device, the specific headline constraint ('tried and tested by a photographer') is the signature title of the camera phone article on this site, and the checklist explicitly looks for 'Camera phones'. Agent B followed the constraints and ground truth perfectly.
